rank.noneHint: Your rank appears after your first scored prediction.

precision.title: Accuracy
precision.empty: No scored predictions in this competition yet.

trend.title: Points per round
trend.empty: Your progress will show after your first round of predictions.

predictions.emptyMessage: Your predictions will appear here once matches are played and scored.

username.label: Username
username.hint: 3–20 characters · letters, numbers and "_" · must be unique.
username.taken: That username is taken. Try another one.

errors.invalid: Invalid username: 3–20 characters, letters, numbers and "_".

errors.permission: Allow access to your photos to pick an image.

password.modalIntro: Choose a new password to secure your account.

email.modalIntro: A confirmation link will be sent to your old and new address to validate the change.
email.sent: Link sent! Confirm the change from your old and new inbox.

communications.label: Communications
communications.description: Receive product news and updates by email.

analytics.label: Usage measurement
analytics.description: Anonymous stats on which features get used. No identifier, no personal data.

diagnostics.label: Crash reports
diagnostics.description: Send technical errors to help fix them. Neither your username nor your email.

export.label: Export my data
export.description: Get a copy of your personal data.

master.label: Notifications
master.subtitleOn: Choose what you want to receive

reminder.label: Prediction reminder
reminder.description: Before each kickoff if you haven't predicted.

results.label: Results & points
results.description: When a match ends and your points are calculated.

notifications.blockedBanner: Notifications are blocked in your {{os}} settings. Turn them on to get your reminders.

delete.rowSubtitle: Irreversible: predictions, history, points and leagues will be permanently lost.
delete.modalIntro: This action is irreversible. You'll permanently lose:

losses.predictions: All your predictions and their history
losses.leagues: Your spot in all your leagues

delete.acknowledge: I understand this action is final.
